templates.name: Follow-up After Demo
templates.description: Professional follow-up after a product demo
templates.template:
Hi {{recipient_name}},

Thank you for taking the time to meet with me and see our solution in action. I hope you found the demo valuable and that it gave you a clear picture of how we can help {{company_name}}.

I wanted to follow up on a few key points we discussed and share some additional resources that might be helpful as you evaluate your options. Given your timeline around {{close_date}}, I'd love to schedule a quick call next week to address any questions.

Please let me know your availability, and feel free to reach out if there's anything specific you'd like to discuss in the meantime.

Best regards,
{{sender_name}}

templates.name: Discount Offer
templates.description: Email presenting a special discount offer
templates.template:
Hi {{recipient_name}},

I wanted to reach out with an exclusive opportunity for {{company_name}}. As a valued prospect, we're offering a special {{discount_percentage}}% discount on your deal if you move forward before {{discount_deadline}}.

This {{deal_name}} package is tailored to your needs and represents a significant value at the discounted rate. The investment of {{deal_amount}} positions you well for {{business_outcome}}.

I'd be happy to walk through the details and finalize the paperwork. When would be a good time for a brief call?

Looking forward to partnering with you.

Best,
{{sender_name}}

templates.name: General Check-in
templates.template:
Hi {{recipient_name}},

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to check in and see how things are progressing on your end with {{project_context}}.

If you have any questions or would like to discuss next steps, I'm here to help. We're committed to making this a smooth process and ensuring {{company_name}} gets the maximum value from our partnership.

Feel free to reach out at your convenience.

Best regards,
{{sender_name}}
